    Wildix

Sales Country Manager - France, Remote

Wildix France Remote

About the job

Wildix is looking for a Sales Country Manager to lead our expansion in France.

You will be responsible for driving revenue growth, building partner relationships, and managing a team of sales professionals across the French market.

Key responsibilities:

  • Develop and execute the sales strategy for France
  • Build and manage channel partner relationships
  • Lead a team of 5+ sales representatives
  • Achieve quarterly revenue targets

Requirements: 7+ years in B2B SaaS sales, fluent French & English, based in France.

Salary: 80 000 to 100 000 EUR per year + commission.
